{{Infobox artifact
| name = Synapse nodes
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Synapse nodes]] are organic machines grown by the [[Aethril]] in multi-dimensional gardens.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c35">''The Captain'', chapter 35</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Synapse nodes]] are required to restore [[Horizon]] to full glory.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c7">''The Engineer'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Synapse nodes]] are contained within the [[Shadow Ark]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c29">''The Engineer'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
